tier_1.title: City Gate Queue
tier_1.description: A long line of merchants and travelers chokes the gate. Guards inspect every cart.
tier_1.success: You know a service entrance. Slip through without the wait.
tier_1.failure: Hours in line. The bureaucracy is merciless.

tier_1.title: Street Pickpocket
tier_1.description: A child bumps into you in the crowd. Quick hands dart toward your belt pouch.
tier_1.success: You catch the hand and the child flees empty-handed.
tier_1.failure: Your coin pouch is lighter. You notice too late.

tier_1.title: Market Surplus
tier_1.description: A merchant is closing up shop, selling the day's unsold stock at a discount.
tier_1.success: Trail rations at half price. Good deal.
tier_1.failure: Sold out before you reach the stall.

tier_2.title: Guild Blockade
tier_2.description: A trade guild has barricaded the district. No one passes without paying tribute.
tier_2.success: You know a route through the sewers. Unpleasant but effective.
tier_2.failure: Pay the toll or waste a day finding another route.

tier_2.title: City Watch Suspicion
tier_2.description: A patrol of guards stops your party. 'You match a description. Come with us.'
tier_2.success: You produce travel papers and they wave you through.
tier_2.failure: Hours of questioning at the watch house. You're released but delayed.

tier_3.title: Guild War in the Streets
tier_3.description: Two rival guilds have chosen this district for their reckoning. Crossbow bolts skip off cobblestones. Barricades block every main route.
tier_3.success: You read the faction colors fast and take a neutral route through a temple quarter.
tier_3.failure: Mistaken for a courier. Both sides want what you're carrying.
tier_3.notes: On failure the party must choose a faction to side with, gaining or losing reputation accordingly.

tier_3.title: Quarantined Quarter
tier_3.description: Red Xs mark every door. Guards in waxed masks turn travelers away. The shortest route runs straight through.
tier_3.success: You find a passage through the tanner's district that skirts the cordon.
tier_3.failure: Detained for inspection. Two days in a holding pen before you're cleared.

tier_4.title: City Under Siege
tier_4.description: Enemy banners ring the walls. Siege engines thud at the gates. Citizens scramble to board up windows. The garrison commander needs every capable sword.
tier_4.success: You coordinate a section of the wall defense and earn passage through the postern gate at dawn.
tier_4.failure: The breach holds but the delay is immense. The party is trapped inside for three days.
tier_4.notes: On success the party may claim a reward from the city council in addition to continuing their journey.
